title: oxyrhynchus papuanus
intro: Oxyrhynchus papuanus, also known as the Papuan orris root, is a type of plant that belongs to the family of Iris, which is a genus of flowering plants with showy flowers. The plant is native to the island of New Guinea and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Oxyrhynchus papuanus include reducing swelling, promoting wound healing, and treating respiratory issues, and it can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or powder.
